products.name: SlimTorq™ STM-190-35
products.descriptor: 190 mm OD frameless slotless direct-drive torque motor with zero cogging

evidence.snippet: Alva Industries Expands SlimTorq™ Portfolio with New STM-190-35 Motor Size

The addition of the STM-190-35 brings the SlimTorq™ STM portfolio to nine available motor sizes, spanning different outer diameters and lengths. Each size can be configured with multiple inner diameter options, winding patterns, and custom configurations, allowing engineers to tailor the motor to their specific application requirements.

products.name: SlimTorq™ Motor Kit
products.descriptor: Evaluation and testing kit combining SlimTorq™ frameless motor, bearings, encoder, and aluminium housing

evidence.snippet: Motor Kit

Motor kits from Alva Industries combine the [SlimTorq™](/slimtorq-motors) frameless rotor and stator into an adaptable package for engineers who want to integrate, test, or evaluate high-performance torque motors without committing to a complete test assembly in early project stages. The motor kits include the slotless, cogging-free motor together with bearings, RLS AksIM-2™ encoders and aluminium housings for mounting.

products.name: SlimTorq™ Custom Motor
products.descriptor: Engineer-to-order frameless motor tailored to customer-specific dimensions, torque, and winding requirements

evidence.snippet: Custom Motor

Custom motors are designed to meet specific application requirements that standard off-the-shelf motors cannot deliver. Unlike generic options, custom motors are designed to meet the unique needs of specific applications. This makes them essential for industries where adaptability is not only a wish but a requirement.

products.name: FiberPrinting™ Slotless Motors
products.descriptor: OEM/licensing offering of ironless slotless motors built with FiberPrinting™ stator technology

evidence.snippet:
### FiberPrinting™ Slotless Motors
Alva's FiberPrinting™ Slotless Motors, offer superior precision & torque density. In combination of zero cogging torque & perfectly linear behavior, they also rival slotted motor in terms of power & torque density. With virtually no saturation & reduced losses, they deliver high performance & compactness for precision applications.

products.name: Halbach Rotors
products.descriptor: Halbach array permanent-magnet rotors for maximised magnetic field density in electric motors

evidence.snippet:
### Halbach Rotors
At Alva, we manufacture Halbach Array rotors to redefine motor excellence. The Halbach Array rotor is a magnetic array featuring radial & tangential magnets meticulously arranged to maximize magnetic field strength. Halbach arrays offer a stronger magnetic field relative to the magnetic mass & volume compared to traditional radial arrays.

products.name: SlimTorq™
products.descriptor: Slotless thin-section frameless torque motor series with zero cogging

evidence.snippet: SlimTorq™ is a slotless thin-section frameless motor series for high-precision applications. The SlimTorq™ motor series has zero cogging, high torque density, no saturation & large through-hole.

Depending on the version of the motor, the lead time may vary. As a general rule of thumb, for units that are standard configurations, the lead time for small volumes (1-5 units) is around 6-8 weeks. For bigger volumes or small customizations the lead time may change, please reach out to us at [sales@alvaindustries.com](mailto:sales@alvaindustries.com) or call us.

products.name: SlimTorq™ Lite
products.descriptor: Lightweight variant of SlimTorq™ optimised for minimum mass with large through-hole

evidence.snippet:
### SlimTorq™
### Lite
The Lite version is designed & optimised to be as light as possible while sustaining a high torque-density. It’s a good choice for weight sensitive applications. It allows the added value of a large through-hole to simplify mechanical integration.

products.name: SlimTorq™ Max
products.descriptor: High-performance variant of SlimTorq™ optimised for maximum torque and motor constant

evidence.snippet:
### SlimTorq™
### Max
The Max version is designed & optimised for maximum performance, i.e. with the highest possible torque & motor-constant the space envelope allows for. It’s a good choice for applications that require the maximum performance in combination with compactness.

products.name: Hydra-100
products.descriptor: Rim-drive marine thruster demonstrator with FiberPrinted™ stator and integrated impeller rotor

evidence.snippet: The Hydra-100 marine thruster specifications can be seen above. If additional information is needed, [contact us](https://www.alvaindustries.com/contact) to learn more.
The Hydra-100 is rated at 48V.

products.notes: Described on the product page as a "marine thruster demonstrator" (line 64 of resource-0003, a single long line exceeding the citation word limit). Readiness set to prototype accordingly.

products.name: TorqStudio
products.descriptor: Web-based motor design and simulation platform for winding selection and performance evaluation

evidence.snippet: To support system-level design and evaluation, the STM-190-35 is fully supported in Alva’s TorqStudio design and simulation platform. [TorqStudio](https://torqstudio.alvaindustries.com/login) allows engineers to evaluate motor performance, explore winding options, and optimize motor selection early in the design process based on application-specific requirements.

unresolved_questions: Hydra-100 readiness: the product page (resource-0003 line 64) describes it as 'a marine thruster demonstrator' — that single line exceeds the citation word limit so could not be directly cited. Readiness set to prototype based on the demonstrator language read during analysis.

FiberPrinting™ Slotless Motors and Halbach Rotors are marketed as technology-provider offerings (OEM/licensing) distinct from the retail SlimTorq™ series; their dedicated pages (technology-provider/slotless-motors, technology-provider/halbach-rotors) were skipped_budget and may contain additional SKU details.
TorqStudio is hosted on a subdomain (torqstudio.alvaindustries.com) not fetched; its full feature set and any pricing/readiness language are unknown from this corpus.

fetch_requests.reason: Dedicated page for FiberPrinting™ Slotless Motors technology offering; would confirm product granularity, readiness, and any OEM/licensing specifics not visible in the technology-provider index page.
Dedicated page for Halbach Rotors product; would confirm whether these are sold as standalone components and clarify readiness and available configurations.
Details the FiberPrinting™ manufacturing technology underlying all SlimTorq™ motors; would help clarify NDAA/compliance claims and production licensing specifics.
